title: Shri Banke Bihari Ji Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Banke Bihari Ji Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Lord Banke Bihari Ji.
description:
Shri Banke Bihari teri aarti gaun,
He Giridhar teri aarti gaun.
Aarti gaun pyare aapko rijhaun,
Shyam Sundar teri aarti gaun.
Bal Krishna teri aarti gaun॥
॥ Shri Banke Bihari teri aarti gaun ॥

Mor mukut pyare sheesh pe sohe.
Pyari bansi mero man mohe.
Dekh chhavi balihari main jaun.
Shri Banke Bihari teri aarti gaun॥
॥ Shri Banke Bihari teri aarti gaun ॥

Charano se nikli Ganga pyari,
Jisne saari duniya taari.
Main un charano ke darshan paun.
Shri Banke Bihari teri aarti gaun॥
॥ Shri Banke Bihari teri aarti gaun ॥

Das anaath ke naath aap ho.
Dukh-sukh jeevan pyare saath aap ho.
Hari charano mein sheesh jhukaun.
Shri Banke Bihari teri aarti gaun॥
॥ Shri Banke Bihari teri aarti gaun ॥

Shri Haribaba ke pyare tum ho.
Mere pyare jeevan dhan ho.
Shyam Sundar teri aarti gaun.
Shri Banke Bihari teri aarti gaun॥
॥ Shri Banke Bihari teri aarti gaun ॥

He Giridhari teri aarti gaun.
Shri Banke Bihari teri aarti gaun॥
Manan Gopal teri aarti gaun,
Kunj Bihari teri aarti gaun.
Shyam Sundar teri aarti gaun॥
॥ Shri Banke Bihari teri aarti gaun ॥

faq.q1: What is the significance of Banke Bihari Ji's Aarti?
faq.a1: It is performed for selfless devotion and divine love for Krishna.
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for Him?
faq.q3: What offerings (Prasad) are preferred for the Lord during Aarti?
faq.a3: Makhan (fresh butter), Mishri, and Tulsi leaves.
faq.q4: Can Banke Bihari Ji's Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, it can be performed at home in the form of Laddu Gopal.
faq.q5: What should be done after the Aarti?
